title: File-manager style notes library (folder tree, multi-select, drag-drop)
forbidden_changes: Modifying compile output path or filename scheme
Removing or weakening existing notes.list, notes.search, notes.get, notes.update, notes.delete, notes.open, notes.reveal, notes.answer, notes.video_playback commands

Allowing notes.tree, notes.create_folder, notes.move, notes.rename_folder, notes.delete_folder, notes.batch_move, or notes.batch_delete to operate outside effective_note_output_dir or the legacy output_dir
Allowing target_folder to contain .. segments, absolute Windows drive prefixes, or symlinks pointing outside the export root
Deleting or renaming the root export folder
Removing or modifying localStorage cache keys vn-qa-cache and vn-graph-cache in non-additive ways
Modifying the path-derived note_id hash function (notes must remain path-stable for cache invalidation to be correct)
Persisting expand/collapse state across navigation (per user requirement)
deliverables: Backend command notes.tree returning sorted folder list and notes with folder paths
Backend command notes.create_folder with parent+name validation
Backend command notes.move with asset directory follow and job.note_id update
Backend command notes.rename_folder that updates every descendant note path
Backend command notes.delete_folder with mandatory confirm flag and asset cleanup
Backend commands notes.batch_move and notes.batch_delete with rollback semantics
Private validate_path_within_roots helper used by every path-mutating command
Frontend tree rendering with expandable folders and notes
Four-button toolbar: edit, new folder, sort, collapse-all
Sort menu supporting created_at, modified_at, title, path with asc/desc
Multi-select mode toggled by edit button with checkbox column
Batch bar with move-to and delete-selected actions
HTML5 drag-and-drop between folders with cache invalidation on drop
Frontend invalidateNoteCaches helper that drops vn-qa-cache and vn-graph-cache entries by note id
Rust unit tests covering every new command (one test minimum per command)
Task completion report with manual smoke results
acceptance_tests: notes.tree returns folders sorted case-insensitive by name and notes with folder field set to parent relative path
notes.create_folder rejects parent paths containing ..
notes.create_folder rejects empty names and existing names
notes.move rejects same-path moves with a structured error
notes.move relocates the .md file and any matching assets/<stem>/ directory
notes.move updates job.note_id for any persisted job pointing at the moved note
notes.move re-registers the new parent directory with the asset protocol scope
notes.rename_folder updates every descendant note path and corresponding job ids
notes.delete_folder refuses to operate without confirm: true
notes.delete_folder refuses to delete the root export directory
notes.batch_move rolls back already-moved notes if a later note fails
notes.batch_delete sets job.note_id and job.output_path to None for deleted notes
Frontend tree renders nested folders up to depth 8 with default root expanded
Clicking a folder toggles expand; clicking a note in normal mode opens it
Sort menu reorders notes within each folder using the chosen field and direction with stable id tie-breaker
Multi-select mode shows checkbox column; selection persists across folder toggles
Batch bar count chip matches the Set size and clears after action or cancel
Drag-and-drop moves a note to a different folder and shows a success toast
Drag-and-drop onto the same folder surfaces a toast instead of silently succeeding
After move, vn-qa-cache and vn-graph-cache entries for the old note id are removed
No regression on existing notes_rpc_scans_updates_and_deletes_markdown test
security_requirements: Every path argument from the frontend must be canonicalized and validated to live under effective_note_output_dir or the legacy output_dir before any filesystem mutation
Rejections of .., absolute Windows drive prefixes, and symlinks pointing outside the export root must return structured errors before any IO
delete_folder and batch_delete require an explicit confirm flag and refuse to operate on the root export directory
notes.move and notes.rename_folder must update job.note_id atomically with the filesystem move under the self.jobs lock
Asset protocol scope must be re-registered for the new parent directory after every move so embedded images continue to render
